sql_array: INSERT INTO test_strings (input_string) VALUES ('hello world; 42'), ('foo; bar; baz'), ('duckdb; is; great');
SELECT regexp_split_to_array(input_string, ';? ') AS split_array FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET input_string = 'updated; row; value' WHERE input_string LIKE '%foo%';
SELECT input_string, regexp_split_to_array(input_string, ';') AS split_parts FROM test_strings WHERE input_string IS NOT NULL;
